shots.focus: Deep focus, from the man in the foreground to the mountains in the background.
shots.composition: A man in a blue shirt and dark pants walks away from a vintage white car on a dirt road, heading towards a large, white, spherical radar dome on a hilltop. The setting is a vast, hilly landscape with a mountain range in the distant background under a clear blue sky. The warm, golden hour lighting creates a cinematic and slightly nostalgic mood.
shots.graphicsOverlays: White logos in the center of the screen: "gte | Polymarket"
shots.audio: Voiceover: "The future is not some place we are going to,"

shots.focus: The iris and pupil of the eye are in sharp focus.
shots.composition: An extreme close-up of a person's blue eye. The surrounding skin is wrinkled and reddish, and fine blood vessels are visible in the white of the eye. The shot is intense and intimate.
A dark frame with a bright, blurry light source creating horizontal streaks, giving the impression of rapid movement or a digital glitch.

shots.focus: The view of the ocean and island outside the window is in focus.
shots.composition: Shot from behind a man in a dark suit sitting at a desk with two open laptops. He looks out a large window at a vast blue ocean with a small, distant island on the horizon. The interior has warm lighting and wood paneling, suggesting a luxurious setting like an office or a yacht.

shots.focus: Soft focus, characteristic of archival footage.
shots.composition: Grainy, archival footage of a boxing match. One boxer in red shorts relentlessly punches his opponent, who is trapped against the corner ropes. The footage has a vintage, distorted quality with faded colors.

shots.focus: The driver's face inside the helmet is in focus.
shots.composition: A tight, shaky close-up of a race car driver inside a dark cockpit. The driver, wearing a helmet and gloves, appears focused and ready for action.
An aerial night shot of a city. The lights flicker on, illuminating the grid of streets and buildings below, revealing the expanse of the urban landscape.

shots.focus: The shot racks focus from the general keyboard to the 'Enter' key.
shots.composition: A low-angle tracking shot moves across the keys of a vintage computer keyboard, settling on the 'Enter' key. A green digital glow emanates from the key as it comes into focus, symbolizing action and entry into a digital world.
shots.graphicsOverlays: A green glow effect is animated around the 'Enter' key.

shots.focus: The news anchor is in focus.
shots.composition: A female BBC news anchor with blonde hair, wearing a red dress, sits at a news desk and speaks directly to the camera against a modern studio backdrop.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Chyron at the bottom left: "BBC WORLD NEWS"

shots.focus: All three men in the split-screen are in focus.
shots.composition: A news segment from 'Closing Bell' is shown in a three-way split-screen. Three men are featured, discussing the topic displayed on the chyron.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Chyron at the bottom: "CLOSING BELL", "CAN BITCOIN MAKE IT AS MONEY?", and a stock ticker.

shots.focus: The reporter and the coin he is holding are in focus.
shots.composition: Reporter Rick Santelli stands on a trading floor, holding up a physical, gold-colored Bitcoin coin for the camera. The background is bustling with traders.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Chyron at the bottom: "THE SANTELLI EXCHANGE" and "COMING UP". Top left: "LIVE CME GROUP".

shots.focus: The laptop screen is in focus.
shots.composition: A close-up shot of a laptop screen displaying a complex financial trading interface. A candlestick chart showing market volatility is the main feature.

A full-screen news graphic shows poll results for the 'NYC MAYORAL RACE'. The percentage points for candidates Zohran Mamdani, Andrew Cuomo, and Curtis Sliwa rapidly increase, simulating a live poll update.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Full-screen graphic with text for the poll, candidate names, and percentages.

shots.focus: The changing numbers on the screen are in focus.
shots.composition: An extreme close-up of a digital stock market display. A candlestick chart is on the left, while columns of rapidly changing green and red numbers are on the right.
A bright red and yellow Fox News 'ELECTION ALERT' graphic fills the screen, showing live results for the Pennsylvania Senate and Presidential races.

Archival footage from the New York Stock Exchange. A group of formally dressed people, including a young girl, stand on the bell podium and applaud. Digital displays show 'Duff & Phelps' and the date.
A dramatic aerial shot of a massive, crowded football stadium at night. The field is brightly lit, and powerful beams of light shine down, creating a spectacular and almost surreal atmosphere.
The iconic clip of NFL player Odell Beckham Jr. making a spectacular, twisting, one-handed touchdown catch while falling backward. The shot captures the peak of athletic achievement.
shots.graphicsOverlays: NBC logo in the top right corner.

shots.focus: Shallow focus with extreme motion blur.
shots.composition: A thrilling point-of-view shot from the cockpit of a Formula 1 car during a night race. The track and other cars blur past, conveying a visceral sense of extreme speed and intensity.

A surreal and epic shot of a person in an orange parka sitting at a modern desk with two monitors in the middle of a vast, frozen Antarctic landscape. A massive cloud of snow from an avalanche rushes toward them, eventually engulfing the scene.
An astronaut floats in the blackness of space, looking at a smartphone held in their gloved hands. The curved horizon of the Earth, covered in clouds, is visible below.
A close-up of a currency counting machine rapidly processing a thick stack of US dollar bills.

At a lavish party, a man in a tuxedo sprays a champagne bottle while embracing a woman in a sparkly blue dress. She laughs and then shouts with joy directly at the camera as it zooms in on her face. The atmosphere is one of exuberant celebration and wealth.

A rapid montage of four quick shots depicting wealth and consumption: a woman in sunglasses toasting with champagne, a woman dancing in a limo, a man in a suit entering a McDonalds, and a woman's hands counting a stack of cash.
A medium close-up of US Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell speaking at a press conference, with American flags and the Federal Reserve seal visible behind him.
A split-screen from a 2004 interview shows a young Dustin Moskovitz on the left and a young Mark Zuckerberg on the right, representing the early days of a tech giant.

shots.focus: All three men are in focus.
shots.composition: A modern CNBC news segment with a host and two guests in a three-way split-screen. The chyron announces a major strategic investment deal involving Polymarket.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Full news graphics, including "NEWS ALERT" and "ICE, POLYMARKET INK STRATEGIC DEAL".

shots.composition: Two quick shots of a Saturn V rocket launch. The first is a high-angle view of the engines igniting with massive force. The second is a wide, ground-level shot of the rocket on the launchpad, fully engulfed in fire and steam.
shots.audio: Loud rocket ignition and rumble sounds.

shots.composition: A cinematic shot of the rocket ascending into space, with its engines firing. The camera follows its trajectory as it moves away from the Earth, which is visible as a blue and white orb below.

shots.focus: The politician and the crowd are in focus.
shots.composition: Politician Zohran Mamdani shakes hands and interacts with an enthusiastic crowd of supporters at a street rally. People are holding signs with his name.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Chyron: "POLLS SHOW MAMDANI WITH BIG LEAD IN NYC MAYORAL RACE"

shots.composition: UFC fighter Conor McGregor makes his entrance walk, shirtless and holding the Irish flag aloft. He is flanked by his entourage in a dramatically lit corridor.
shots.graphicsOverlays: BT Sport logo in the bottom right.

shots.movement: Static, with a quick cut to a closer angle.
shots.composition: Archival footage shows basketball legend Michael Jordan soaring through the air for a powerful dunk, showcasing his iconic athleticism.
The Liverpool football team celebrates winning a championship. They are on a stage, joyfully lifting a large trophy as pyrotechnics and confetti erupt around them.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Premier League logo in the top right.

shots.composition: News footage captures a tense moment at a rally where Secret Service agents rush to shield former President Donald Trump at his podium due to a perceived threat.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Full news graphics, including "BREAKING NEWS" and "SECRET SERVICE: 'THE FORMER PRESIDENT IS SAFE'".

shots.composition: A rapid-fire montage of impactful moments: Trump speaking at a rally, a boxer taking a punch, UFC commentators reacting in shock, a fighter jet maneuvering, Brad Pitt as a race car driver, a golden skull trophy, a hand on a mouse, a financial chart, Kobe Bryant celebrating, and finally, an astronaut planting a 'gte' flag on the moon.
shots.audio: Donald Trump: "Look what happened." Intense music and sound effects build throughout. Voiceover: "The universe rewards those who see what hasn't happened yet."

shots.composition: The video fades to black, and then the white logos for 'gte' and 'Polymarket' appear in the center of the screen.
shots.audio: Voiceover: "...hasn't happened yet." Music swells and fades.

shots.composition: A black screen with white, digital-style text. The main text reads 'COMING SOON', with a disclaimer below it in a smaller font.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Text: "COMING SOON" and "(SUBJECT TO ELIGIBILITY REQUIRMENTS)"
